backward_compatibility.rationale: Dead code removal — generated-types.ts has 0 imports; deprecated aliases are unused. No external consumers.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Delete dead file, remove deprecated aliases, consolidate into single canonical source.

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous governance approval. Maximizes DRY, satisfies dead code policy, respects YAGNI. config.ts stays under 200 lines.
